feat.name: Advanced Herbalism
feat.text: Your herbalist talents continue to grow with use and you have become potent at making even more remedies from less. You can create up to 6 herbal items per day with advanced alchemy.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.special: At 10th level or higher, you can select this feat a second time to increase the number to 8.
